text: git commit -m "initial commit"

text: the REST API follows resource-oriented URL naming conventions

text: the thread pool reuses a fixed number of threads for task execution

translation: Protocol Buffersシリアライズ形式はJSONよりもサイズが小さい

text: use chaos engineering to test system resilience under failure conditions

text: configure log rotation to prevent disk space exhaustion

text: the just-in-time compiler optimizes bytecode at runtime for better performance

text: the copy-on-write mechanism defers memory duplication until modification

text: use a content-addressable store where the hash of data serves as its key

text: the bloom filter provides probabilistic membership testing with no false negatives

text: use a state machine to model complex workflow transitions

text: the tail call optimization prevents stack overflow in recursive algorithms

text: use database connection multiplexing to reduce the number of open connections

text: the sparse index only stores entries for some of the indexed values
